overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The vehicle travels from a dense neon-lit urban canyon under massive overpasses onto open highways and finally into winding hillside roads, showcasing the game's distinctive teal-green neon aesthetic and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway under massive overpass with dense neon signage

events.description: silver sedan overtakes on the left lane with motion blur
red vehicle passes on the right side near the guardrail

agents.ego_description: navigating through rain-soaked multi-lane highway under massive concrete overpass, maintaining speed between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking rapidly on the left with visible motion blur
car ahead with glowing red tail lights moving in same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling with embedded linear lights spanning the highway
tall vertical digital billboard displaying red neon imagery of a face
metal guardrail with alternating yellow and black warning stripes
cluster of large digital screens mounted on the overpass structure displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a massive concrete overpass in a dense cyberpunk urban environment. The road is wet with rain, reflecting the glow of numerous neon billboards and overhead digital screens. Other vehicles overtake and travel alongside as the camera moves steadily forward through the sheltered multi-lane highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway approach with massive digital billboards and distant city skyline

events.description: exits covered overpass into open highway with visible night sky and rain
dark sports car overtakes on the left with red tail lights streaking

agents.ego_description: accelerating on open highway toward large digital billboards, overtaking slower vehicles on the left

notable_agents.action: dark sports car overtaking rapidly with visible motion blur and glowing exhaust

entered.detail: massive horizontal digital billboard displaying COLA advertisement with white background and product imagery
red triangular warning signs with neon illumination mounted on the guardrail barrier
tall dark skyscrapers silhouetted against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the vehicle exits the covered overpass into a wide highway exposed to the rainy night sky. A massive COLA billboard dominates the center view ahead, while red triangular warning signs line the right guardrail. The city skyline is visible in the distance as the vehicle overtakes other traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside highway with neon-lit buildings and rocky terrain

events.description: highway curves right transitioning from urban highway to winding hillside road with guardrails
entering North Oak district indicated by on-screen text notification

agents.ego_description: navigating winding wet road through hilly terrain, following the curve of the highway past neon-lit structures

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt road with double yellow center lines curving through hilly terrain with reflective wet surface
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation and palm trees visible on the ridge against dark sky
tall modern street lamps with bright white light illuminating the rain and road surface
traditional-asian styled building structure with bright cyan and red neon signage and vertical lighting strips
blue and black garbage bags piled on the roadside near the guardrail

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions to a winding two-lane road cutting through hilly terrain. Street lamps illuminate the rain-slicked asphalt as the vehicle curves along the guardrail. On the right, a distinctive neon-lit building with Asian architectural elements glows against the dark hillside, while trash bags pile near the roadside. The environment shifts from dense urban to more open natural surroundings with rocky embankments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a sheltered urban canyon into an open highway and finally onto a winding hillside road. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where the wet pavement reflects a dense array of neon billboards and digital screens as other vehicles glide alongside. As the vehicle exits the covered structure, the scene opens up into a wide highway exposed to the rainy night sky, dominated by a massive COLA billboard and red warning signs against a distant city skyline. The environment then shifts from the urban sprawl to a winding two-lane road, where the camera curves along rain-slicked asphalt and rocky embankments. Finally, the journey leads past a neon-lit building with Asian architectural elements and roadside debris, moving away from the city center into the dark, hilly terrain.
